title: Prompt artifact schema (kickoff prompt §B, handbook ch02)
description: Every prompt file under prompts/<id>/vN.yaml MUST satisfy this schema. Prompts are versioned artifacts, not string literals.

id.description: Stable prompt identifier; matches the folder name.

version.description: Monotonic version. Bumps require a CHANGELOG entry.

owner.description: Team or individual accountable for this prompt.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema the model output must validate against.

eval_suite.description: evals/ suite that gates changes to this prompt.
